text:
Living is... (生きてくってことは..., Ikite Kutte Koto Wa...) is a song from the Musical Hunter × Hunter, sung by Gon's voice actress, Junko Takeuchi; Killua's voice actress, Kanako Mitsuhashi; Kurapika's voice actress, Yuki Kaida; Leorio's voice actor, Hozumi Gōda and Madam Isabel's actress, Yuu Daiki.
